author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(choices): clarify how to interact (#5849)
body:
fixes https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/issues/5846

thanks to https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/pull/1055 it's more clarified when enter is used etc

I tried out the `validate` function, but i don't think it fits our use case
